nav.finalTest.label: Final test
action.resetConfirm: Reset all progress in this browser? This action cannot be undone.
error.load.heading: Failed to load the training
error.load.body: Data (data/*.json) loads via fetch() and requires an http(s) server — don't open the file via file://.
error.load.hint: Run locally: python3 -m http.server 8000 in the genai-llm-training directory, then open http://localhost:8000
module.menu.heading: Path {pathId} — {pathName}
module.menu.intro: Choose a module to go to its content and a quiz with instant feedback. The final test unlocks once the required modules are completed.
module.menu.introFormative: Choose a module to go to its content and exercises with instant feedback. This path is formative — no final test or certificate.
module.title: {moduleId} — {moduleName}
module.hint.checkAllQuestions: Check all quiz questions to unlock module completion.
module.hint.canComplete: You can mark the module as completed.
module.nextStep.passed: Path passed. You can download your result on the test screen.
module.nextStep.goToTest: Next step: take the final test.
module.nextStep.completeRequired: Complete the required modules to unlock the test.
module.nextStep.formative: Start with the self-check (Holak Scale), then go through the growth modules. No test, no certificate.
module.summary.heading: Summary
module.summary.checklistTitle: Checklist — before you use an LLM
quiz.inline.heading: Inline quiz ({count} questions)
feedback.criticalFail.head: Security error
feedback.criticalFail.body: This is a security error. Before passing, go back to the data hygiene and prompt injection sections.
interaction.practical.passed: Practical task passed ({score}/{max}) — it counts toward passing path {pathId}.
interaction.practical.belowThreshold: Practical task below threshold ({score}/{max}). Improve the criteria and evaluate again — the result counts toward passing path {pathId}.
interaction.rubric.defaultHint: Select the right elements for this criterion.
maturity.statementsLegend: Check the statements that are true today:
maturity.disclaimer: This is an indicative diagnosis — it can't be „failed”.
test.heading: Final test — {pathName}
test.meta: {count} questions · pass threshold {threshold}% · all critical questions must be correct.
test.modeNote: Test mode: feedback and result appear only after you finish the attempt.
test.practicalNote: Fully passing this path also requires the practical task to be evaluated — complete the interaction in module: {modules} (the interaction records the practical result).
test.allAttemptsUsed: All test attempts have been used.
test.submitConfirm: You have answered {answered} of {total} questions. Missing ones will count as incorrect. Finish the attempt?
path.hero.lead: An interactive, self-paced training: a path tailored to your role, quizzes with instant feedback, and a result summary at the end. Everything runs in the browser — no accounts, no data sent.
path.select.heading: Choose your path
path.select.intro: The path determines which modules are required, how many questions the final test has, and what the pass threshold is. You can change it later — each path's progress is saved separately.
path.card.name: {pathId} — {pathName}
path.card.meta.formative: Time: {time} · diagnosis + growth, no exam or certificate
path.privacy.note: Progress and results are saved locally in your browser; nothing is sent to a server and we don't use cookies.
result.passed.heading: Path passed
result.score.label: path score
result.gates.heading: Status of pass gates
result.weakAreas.heading: To review
result.failed.heading: Path not yet passed
result.failed.notice.withGates: {score} — path score. To pass, satisfy all the gates below.
result.failed.notice.noGates: {score} — path score. Path not passed — go back and satisfy all the required conditions for passing this path.
chrome.title: GenAI & LLM Training — QualityCat
chrome.theme.label: Theme
chrome.metaDescription: Interactive GenAI & LLM training: S1/S2/S3 paths, quizzes, final test, result.
chrome.footer.note: Static training (GitHub Pages). Progress is saved locally in your browser; nothing is sent to a server, no cookies.
